purpose: Lock official derivative visual/layout structure so only field values change per origin and per page.
scope: one origin = six pages: hub, human_summary, faq, ja_ai_index, en_ai_index, zh_ai_index
fixed_elements: hero/panel/card border radius, border, shadow, background
top status badge position and style
common notice block placement and style
origin connection/reference bundle placement and style
hard_rules: Do not edit visual structure per page.
Do not change CSS per page.
Do not add page-specific decorations unless the template version is changed intentionally.
Do not place derivative number under title.
Do not use Pilot labels after officialization review begins.
All generated static and deploy/lolipop outputs must be synchronized.
Master should review rendered output, not source layout differences.
boundary: preview branch only; not public activation; no sitemap update; no approval record
